heading: Creation of Mississippi River Commission
label: 641 Creation of Mississippi River Commission
text: A commission is created to be called “The Mississippi River Commission”, to consist of seven members.
notes: CodificationThis was the first section of an act entitled “An act to provide for the appointment of a ‘Mississippi River Commission’ for the improvement of said river from the Head of the Passes near its mouth to its head-waters”.

Appropriation for Salaries and Expenses, , omitted as temporary and executed, provided for the expenditure of an appropriation of $175,000 for salaries of the commission and necessary expenses of surveys, examinations, etc.Act June 28, 1879, ch. 43, § 721 Stat. 38
Missouri River CommissionThe Missouri River Commission was created by , , and repealed by , .act July 5, 1884, ch. 229, § 123 Stat. 144act July 13, 1902, ch. 1079, § 132 Stat. 367
